note: sost-mine.html and sost-btctalk-ann.html updated to the Phase 2 SbPoW label workflow. Both pages previously documented the pre-7100 syntax `./sost-miner --address sost1...` which is now rejected by every node on the network from block 7,100 onward. A new miner following sost-mine.html step-by-step would have launched, been rejected, and walked away thinking the protocol was broken. Both pages now follow the same workflow already used in sost-explorer.html, sost-getting-started.html, sost-quickstart.html and sost-wallet-security.html: (1) ./sost-cli --wallet phase2-miner-wallet.json newwallet then getnewaddress phase2-miner; (2) ./sost-miner --wallet phase2-miner-wallet.json --mining-key-label phase2-miner with the correct rpc, profile, threads and blocks flags; (3) explicit note that the label is freeform (any string the user can type works as long as getnewaddress and --mining-key-label match). sost-mine.html steps 1 and 4 rewritten in full; sost-btctalk-ann.html mining-instructions block rewritten with a wallet-creation step inserted before the miner launch. Cross-page audit clean: zero remaining `sost-miner.*--address` legacy occurrences in any HTML file under website/. NO consensus, NO RPC schema, NO node, NO miner, NO transaction wire format, NO actual code change. Pure documentation correction.
